full_text:
Received a small piece of tissue, which contained a small part of a stiff, white-ish tumor. Removed excess connective tissue and processed only the white parts.

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 mL DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µL Dispase + 100 µL DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 8.9 mL DMEM/F12+++, 1 mL Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 100 µL DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media. A 1:10 dilution was made for counting.

Sequentially dissociated cells: RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media. A 1:10 dilution was made for counting.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 3x 12.43 E6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 3x 8.22 E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

Flow staining

The conditions to stain were:

dispase dissociated cells, unstained

sequentially dissociated cells, DCM FMO

dispase dissociated cells, MC

sequentially dissociated cells, MC

The aliquots were stained with the following panel and according to this protocol Fibroblast_flow_cytometry_staining_protocol.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 4.18 | 2.56
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.92 | 1.72
 | viability [%] | 69.8 | 67.1
 | size [µm] | 8.6 | 9.0
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 3.68 | 2.77
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.73 | 1.82
 | viability [%] | 74 | 65.6
 | size [µm] | 8.3 | 8.6
Average | [cells/ml] | 3.93 E6 x10
=39.3 E6 | 2.665 E6 x10
=26.65 E6
 | total [cells] | 39.3 E6 in 1 mL | 26.65 E6 in 1 ml
 | viability [%] | 71.9 | 66.35
